title: Saeima rejects proposal to change second-pillar pension rules
summary_full: Latvia's parliament, the Saeima, decided on March 5th not to back proposals to change the rules on second-pillar pension savings.
summary_public: Latvia's parliament, the Saeima, decided on March 5th not to back proposals to change the rules on second-pillar pension savings.

LV.label: neutral
